title: Northstar Analytics Dashboard
subtitle: Configurable analytics for enterprise teams.
description: Designed and built the analytics dashboard for Northstar, an enterprise data platform. Delivered a configurable charting system and a visual query builder that let non-technical users explore their data, plus a component layer that kept the product consistent as it scaled.
scope: Dashboard design and front-end build — charting system, query builder, and component architecture.
resumeBullets: Designed and built Northstar's analytics dashboard, including a configurable charting system used daily by enterprise customers.
Shipped a visual query builder that let non-technical users explore data without writing queries.
Architected a reusable component layer that kept the product consistent as the surface area grew.
